---
title: ""
format: html
editor: visual
navbar: false
---

## Week 7 - Wednesday, March 11th

### Class Goals

1.  Learn how to define and evaluate the quality of a likert scale.
2.  Review descriptive statistics, and think about predictive statistics.
3.  Students all learning; Professor not rushing; we all enriched and nourished by knowledge of research methods.

:::::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
### Announcements and Agenda

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
-   **Spring Break in Two Weeks.** Hooray.
-   **Fill out the professor evaluation.** Please and thank you \<3
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
-   **11:10 - 11:50.** Check-In and Review (Personality).
-   **11:50 - 12:10.** Defining a Likert Scale.
-   **12:10 - 12:35.** Dig Deeper (Discussion 7)
:::
:::::
::::::

### Class Slides

```{=html}
<iframe data-external="1" class="slide-deck" src="/rm/slides/7_surveys.html" width="100%" height="500px" title="" border="5px"></iframe>
```

### Useful Links

-   [**Check-In Here : tinyurl.com/prepattern**](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdzuU9IKFyElROMwkgkZgGj_3DuXxIKzot5kjkEu2QXpI7S5g/viewform?usp=header)
-   [Dig Deeper Assignment](/rm/notes/digdeeper.qmd)
-   [Vision Board](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14u3w5edvo6KSFRw2U9t1knDANFSGBWOvDjS7-ZGujos/edit?usp=sharing)
-   [Personality Profile](/rm/readings/Personality.qmd) \[if time\]

## Next Week before Class

### Week 7 Discussion Questions.

**We are going to resume working on the DIG DEEPER assignment. Hooray. Note that there are some support videos below the assignment!**

1.  **ON THE** [VISION BOARD](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14u3w5edvo6KSFRw2U9t1knDANFSGBWOvDjS7-ZGujos/edit?usp=sharing)**.** Fill out the categories. Just do your best. We hopefully modeled this in class :)

2.  **FOR THE ASSIGNMENT.** Copy/paste what you did on the vision board so professor can quickly grade and give feedback as needed.

### Dig Deeper Part 1 : Finding and Evaluating a Research Article

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0;"><iframe src="https://www.loom.com/embed/50356ed56cab42dca4511d840aed4a38" frameborder="0" webkitallowfullscreen mozallowfullscreen allowfullscreen style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;"></iframe></div>

### Dig Deeper Part 2 : Evaluating the Measures

<div style="position: relative; padding-bottom: 56.25%; height: 0;"><iframe src="https://www.loom.com/embed/171ad222f3bb4037bcd80c30f4c84156" frameborder="0" webkitallowfullscreen mozallowfullscreen allowfullscreen style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;"></iframe></div>
